states.name: Elmina
states.title: Yuletide Rogue
states.description:
"Hey! Watch where you're going, you nearly made me drop my stuff!"

"What are you rushing around for, anyway? All the good stuff in this market's already been snatched up. Don't tell me you're one of those people who put their shopping off to the last minute."

"...sigh. Of course you are. I should have guessed."

"Well, don't just stand there. Follow me. I know a couple places that can help you out, but you better not do this again, you hear? The people in your life must really care about you. What's the point of Christmas if you don't give them something special?"

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Yuletide Rogue
states.description:
"Merry Christ -- what? You again? How'd you find out where I live?! If you followed me home, I swear..."

"One of the kids let you know, huh? I keep telling them not to bother with strangers, but they never seem to listen."

"Hey, you weren't a stranger, you were -- a charity case! You were wandering around so lost, it would have been bad karma to leave you on your own! Anyway, why did you even come here?"

"...to give me a thank you present. Yeah, right. There isn't a thing in the city left to buy."

"Huh? You made it yourself?"

"..."

"Guess it'd be even more bad karma to turn you away now. Fine, fine, come in. But watch where you're going. I didn't buy all these gifts just to have 'em stepped on."

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Yuletide Rogue
states.description:
"Hey. Sorry to bother you so late at night."

"How did I find your place? Easy. I followed you. You're not hard to miss."

"...I know. I'm a horrible hypocrite, aren't I? But I didn't want the night to pass without paying you back for earlier."

"I don't like leaving people hanging. And I thought you might be going home lonely. Holidays can get pretty quiet once the parties are over."

"N-not that I'm inviting myself in. I just brought you one last Christmas present. That's all."

"...I can stay as long as I want?"

"..."

"Thanks. I think I'd like that.""Merry Christmas. Now shut the door before you let in the cold."
